name: openai-ads-conversions
description: Set up OpenAI Ads Measurement Pixel and optional Conversions API instrumentation.

interface.shortDescription: Set up OpenAI Ads Pixel and CAPI tracking
interface.longDescription: Use OpenAI Ads Conversions to guide Codex through adding or extending Measurement Pixel and optional Conversions API instrumentation in a repository, with local verification helpers and guidance for safe secret handling, deduplication, attribution context, and setup reporting.
defaultPrompt: Set up OpenAI Ads conversions tracking in this repository.
